ddls:
CREATE TABLE "desserts" (
  "dessert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dessert */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dessert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the dessert */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the dessert */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the dessert (e.g., cake, pastry) */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories per 100g serving */,
  "fat" REAL /* Fat content per 100g serving (in grams) */,
  "carbs" REAL /* Carbohydrate content per 100g serving (in grams) */,
  "protein" REAL /* Protein content per 100g serving (in grams) */,
  "iron" REAL /* Iron content per 100g serving (in percentage) */,
  "vegan" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the dessert is vegan */,
  "gluten_free" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the dessert is gluten-free */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the dessert image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dessert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dessert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dessert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_desserts_calories FOREIGN KEY ("calories") REFERENCES nutritional_data ("calories")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ingredient (e.g., dairy, fruit) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the ingredient */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient quantity */,
  "sourcing" TEXT /* Source of the ingredient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ingredient was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ingredient was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_chain" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the ingredient */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the ingredient (in days) */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the ingredient */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the ingredient */,
  "shipping_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of shipping the ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_chain_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_data" (
  "dessert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dessert */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories per 100g serving */,
  "fat" REAL /* Fat content per 100g serving (in grams) */,
  "carbs" REAL /* Carbohydrate content per 100g serving (in grams) */,
  "protein" REAL /* Protein content per 100g serving (in grams) */,
  "iron" REAL /* Iron content per 100g serving (in percentage) */,
  "sodium" REAL /* Sodium content per 100g serving (in grams) */,
  "sugar" REAL /* Sugar content per 100g serving (in grams) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dessert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allergens" (
  "dessert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dessert */,
  "allergen" TEXT /* Allergen present in the dessert (e.g., nuts, gluten) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the allergen (e.g., mild, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dessert_id", "allergen")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumers" (
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the consumer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the consumer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the consumer */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the consumer */,
  "loyalty_program" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the consumer is part of a loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "dessert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dessert being reviewed */,
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the consumer (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_dessert_id FOREIGN KEY ("dessert_id") REFERENCES desserts ("dessert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_consumer_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumer_id") REFERENCES consumers ("consumer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "dessert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dessert being rated */,
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumer who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the consumer (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_dessert_id FOREIGN KEY ("dessert_id") REFERENCES desserts ("dessert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_consumer_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumer_id") REFERENCES consumers ("consumer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "dessert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dessert being ordered */,
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_consumer_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumer_id") REFERENCES consumers ("consumer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_dessert_id FOREIGN KEY ("dessert_id") REFERENCES desserts ("dessert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "dessert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dessert being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the dessert being ordered */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal for the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_dessert_id FOREIGN KEY ("dessert_id") REFERENCES desserts ("dessert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the payment */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the shipping record belongs to */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., ground, air) */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
